hooks.command: if git diff --quiet HEAD -- 'src/' 'build.gradle' '*.java' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'No code changes, skipping tests.'; exit 0; fi && ./gradlew test 2>&1 || true
if git diff --quiet HEAD -- 'src/' 'build.gradle' '*.java' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'No code changes, skipping QA.'; exit 0; fi && ./qa/run.sh verify
